summary: The implementation successfully addresses all 9 requirements. Upload flow optimizations include comprehensive error handling with specific error types, retry logic with exponential backoff, form validation with inline errors, loading states, query invalidation for immediate post display, and success toast notifications. UI updates include center-aligned menu items in the Layout dropdown and icon replacements (Pencil for edit, Trash2 for delete) in PostCard. All changes are evidenced in the modified files.
